name: 7q11_23_Williams_Beuren_region
description: 7q11.23 Williams-Beuren syndrome critical region, flanked by three SD blocks (centromeric, medial, telomeric) containing GTF2I/GTF2IRD/NCF1/POM121 paralogs. NAHR between directly oriented copies causes recurrent ~1.5-1.8 Mb deletions (Williams-Beuren syndrome) or duplications (7q11.23 duplication syndrome).

architecture.internal_structure: Three SD blocks (centromeric, medial, telomeric) of ~300-400 kb each at >98% identity, flanking the ~1.55 Mb single-copy interval that contains ELN, LIMK1, GTF2IRD1, GTF2I.
